description: Verification grading rubric: 8 dimensions (unified scoring framework + Visual 8th), 0-10 scale, weighted composite. Fails the merge gate below composite 6.0 (BLOCKED verdict below 5.0 per the grade table); security below 4.0 is a hard blocker; compliance below 6.0 fails the gate. When Visual is skipped (API-only projects), its 0.10 weight is redistributed proportionally across the base dimensions. Bands use integer anchors: round a fractional score to the nearest integer before band lookup (3.2 -> 3 -> poor).

bands.label: adequate
bands.description: Core paths work, some edge cases missing

bands.label: good
bands.description: Core requirements met, most edge cases handled

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: All functional requirements met, edge cases handled, zero regressions

bands.label: poor
bands.description: Many errors, poor patterns, high complexity

bands.label: good
bands.description: Zero errors, < 5 warnings, minimal any, good patterns

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: Zero lint errors/warnings, strict types, exemplary patterns, low complexity

bands.label: good
bands.description: Good latency, no N+1, reasonable caching

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: p99 within budget, zero N+1, optimal caching, efficient resource usage

bands.label: adequate
bands.description: No critical, 1-2 high, most OWASP compliant

bands.label: good
bands.description: No critical/high, all OWASP, excellent practices

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: No vulnerabilities, all OWASP compliant, secure by design

bands.label: partial
bands.description: Will hit limits soon, needs rework

bands.label: adequate
bands.description: Scales for current needs, some concerns

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: Horizontal scaling ready, stateless design, efficient data patterns

bands.label: failing
bands.description: < 30% coverage or tests fail to run

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: >= 90% coverage, meaningful assertions, edge cases, no flaky tests

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: Perfect REST/UI contracts, RFC 9457 errors, full Zod, WCAG AA

dimensions.name: visual
dimensions.description: Weight is 0.00 for API-only projects — redistributed proportionally across base dimensions (see quality-model.md).

bands.label: partial
bands.description: Layout issues, missing content, a11y problems

bands.label: good
bands.description: Good layout, minor visual issues, WCAG AA

bands.label: excellent
bands.description: Pixel-perfect layout, full a11y, complete content, responsive
